comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
Minor but should be fixed in any clean write-up. The displayed identity in the proof of Cor 2.7 reads
  |v*|^2 = |a+b|^2 = |a^*|^2 + 2(a.b) + |b^*|^2,
but there are no starred objects a^*, b^*; the terms are simply |a|^2 and |b|^2. The logic ('|a|^2 >= |v*|^2 and |b|^2 > 0 => a.b < 0') is correct; only the notation is wrong.
